allow: Bash(ls "E:\\localhost\\little star nursery\\assets\\images\\" 2>/dev/null || echo "No images folder found")

Bash(cmd /c "if not exist \\"E:\\\\localhost\\\\school\\\\assets\\\\images\\" mkdir \\"E:\\\\localhost\\\\school\\\\assets\\\\images\\""
cmd /c "copy \\"E:\\\\localhost\\\\little star nursery\\\\assets\\\\images\\\\logo.png\\" \\"E:\\\\localhost\\\\school\\\\assets\\\\images\\\\\\" && echo OK")

Bash(powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'E:\\localhost\\school\\assets\\images' | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'E:\\localhost\\little star nursery\\assets\\images\\*' -Destination 'E:\\localhost\\school\\assets\\images\\' -Force; Write-Host 'Copied'; Get-ChildItem 'E:\\localhost\\school\\assets\\images' | Select-Object Name")
